radius.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the tooltip component for radius.

padding-inline.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the tooltip component for padding inline.

padding-block.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the tooltip component for padding block.

max-inline-size.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the tooltip component for max inline size.

offset.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the tooltip component for offset.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tooltip component for background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the tooltip component for foreground.

font-size.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the tooltip component for font size.

font-weight.$description: Material 3 font weight used by the tooltip component for font weight.

line-height.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the tooltip component for line height.

shadow.$description: Material 3 shadow used by the tooltip component for tooltip shadow.

show-delay.$description: Material 3 duration used by the tooltip component for tooltip show delay.

hide-delay.$description: Material 3 duration used by the tooltip component for tooltip hide delay.
